description_long: This is a medium-sized, woven wicker handbag with a rounded, bulbous body and a single, thick, circular handle arching over the top. The basket-like construction features a tightly interlaced pattern of natural fibers, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The handle is integrated into the body, providing a sturdy grip and a seamless transition between the handle and the main compartment. The opening at the top is wide, allowing easy access to the interior, which is likely unlined and open. The surface displays a natural beige coloration with subtle variations in tone, characteristic of untreated wicker. There are no visible closures, logos, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a simple, functional design.
description: A rounded, woven wicker handbag with a thick circular handle and a natural beige finish, featuring a simple, rustic design with no visible decorations or closures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, rounded body and the full circular handle arching over the top opening.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bag and the thickness of the handle, with the opening partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the woven pattern and handle symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the bag's depth and handle curvature.
attribute_strap_type: single, thick, circular short handle; non-adjustable; fixed directly to the body
attribute_closure_mechanism: none; open top with no visible closure
